introSection: Disney Rollercoaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by US manufacturer B. A. Schiff & Associates currently located at Springfield Fun Park in St. Columb, Cornwall, England, UK.
fullText: Disney Rollercoaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by US manufacturer B. A. Schiff & Associates currently located at Springfield Fun Park in St. Columb, Cornwall, England, UK.
